March 2, 2026

Food safety alert

Investigation status: Closed
Recall issued: Yes

This outbreak investigation is over. CDC and public health officials investigated a multistate outbreak of Listeria infections linked to deli meat distributed nationwide.

Fast Facts

  • Cases: 9
  • Hospitalizations: 3
  • Deaths: 0
  • States: 6

Symptoms of Listeria

Pregnant people, newborns, adults 65 and older, and people with weakened immune systems are more likely to get seriously ill.
